translations.es: Sovereign asset token for Sovereign Dove Trust (SDT) supporting Charity & Humanitarian Aid. Fully backed and non-custodial. (Traducido por IA para soporte de fondos en América Latina y España)
translations.pt: Sovereign asset token for Sovereign Dove Trust (SDT) supporting Charity & Humanitarian Aid. Fully backed and non-custodial. (Traduzido por IA para suporte de fundos no Brasil e Portugal)
